name: rtl-for-vs-code-agents
description: Right-to-left (RTL) support for AI chat agents: Claude Code, Codex (ChatGPT), Copilot, Gemini, Antigravity.

commands.title: RTL for VS Code Agents: Check and Inject Claude Code
RTL for VS Code Agents: Configure Custom CSS Loader
RTL for VS Code Agents: Check for Updates
RTL for VS Code Agents: Remove All RTL Injections

rtlForVsCodeAgents.autoInject.description: Automatically check for new Claude Code versions and inject RTL support.

rtlForVsCodeAgents.checkIntervalHours.description: How often to check for new Claude Code versions (in hours). 0 disables periodic checks (startup only).

rtlForVsCodeAgents.autoConfigureCustomCs.description: Automatically configure Custom CSS and JS Loader to load the RTL script.

rtlForVsCodeAgents.userMessageBorder.markdownDescription:
Show a colored border around user messages for easy identification.

**Tip:** It's easier to toggle this by right-clicking the ↑↓ navigation buttons — changes are instant (no reload needed). This setting is only used as the initial default on first install.

rtlForVsCodeAgents.yoloCountdownSeconds.markdownDescription:
YOLO mode countdown duration (seconds) before auto-approving tool calls.

**0 = instant** (no progress bar).

**Tip:** It's easier to change this by right-clicking the 💪 button directly — changes are instant and persistent (no reload needed). This setting is only used as the initial default on first install.

rtlForVsCodeAgents.autoCheckUpdates.description: Automatically check for updates from GitHub on startup.

rtlForVsCodeAgents.updateCheckIntervalHo.description: How often to check for updates (in hours). 0 = check on startup only.
